title: Market segmentation
summary: 9609 AS — demographic, geographic, psychographic, and behavioural segments.

simpleExplanation.title: Divide the market to conquer it
simpleExplanation.summary: Segmentation splits customers into groups with similar needs so marketing can be targeted effectively.

sections.content: **Market segmentation** (3.1.6) bridges **3.1.5** and **3.3 marketing mix**. Name **segment + targeting** in case answers.
